tools.name: read
tools.description: Read file contents with optional offset and limit. Returns up to 2000 lines by default with line numbers (cat -n format).

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to read

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (0-based, optional)

limit.description: Number of lines to read (default: 2000, optional)

tools.name: write
tools.description: Write content to a file (creates new file or overwrites existing). IMPORTANT: You must read the file first using filesystem_read before overwriting it. ALWAYS prefer filesystem_edit for modifying existing files to prevent data loss.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Edit file by replacing exact string matches. SAFETY: If oldString appears multiple times, you MUST provide more context to make it unique, or use replaceAll. This prevents accidental changes. Preserves indentation exactly as in the original file.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to edit

oldString.description: Exact text to replace (must match exactly, including indentation). If this appears multiple times in the file, provide more surrounding context to make it unique.

newString.description: Text to replace it with (must preserve indentation to match surrounding code)

replaceAll.description: Replace all occurrences in the file (useful for renaming variables). Default: false for safety.

tools.name: list
tools.description: List files and directories in a path with details (size, modified date, permissions).

path.description: Absolute path to directory (optional, defaults to cwd)

ignore.description: Array of glob patterns to ignore (optional)

tools.name: search-files
tools.description: Search for files by glob pattern (e.g., '**/*.ts', 'src/**/*.json'). Fast file pattern matching.

path.description: Directory to search in (optional, defaults to cwd)

tools.name: search-content
tools.description: Search file contents using regex. Returns files with matches sorted by modification time.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to search for in file contents

path.description: Directory to search in (optional, defaults to cwd)

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a file or directory (recursive). Use with caution.

path.description: Absolute path to file or directory to delete

tools.name: copy
tools.description: Copy a file to another location

tools.name: mkdir
tools.description: Create a directory (with parents if needed)

recursive.description: Create parent directories if needed (default: true)
